system.description:
### Tier 1 Standard A savage, regenerative reptilian humanoid wielding an assault rifle and a bad attitude. Motives & Tactics: Intimidate, regenerate wounds, flank, suppress fire

#### Features Hyper-Regeneration - Passive: When the Vorcha gains the Spotlight, if they has marked HP but are not defeated, clear 1 HP.

Bloodlust - Action: The Vorcha has an advantage against opponents who have already marked HP.

}}
